Site_1_particulate_matter.description: Particulate matter in air samples (μgms/m³) at Site 1; summary statistics used in the two-sample t-test. Same measurement as Site_2_particulate_matter but from a different site.

Site_2_particulate_matter.description: Particulate matter in air samples (μgms/m³) at Site 2; summary statistics used in the two-sample t-test. Same measurement as Site_1_particulate_matter but from a different site.
